description: Universal ASIO driver (KoordASIO). Non-portable (-np): runs the vendor installer; installs under Program Files system-wide.
notes: Package name ends with -np (non-portable): Scoop only automates the official installer. Files live under %ProgramFiles%\KoordASIO, not under the Scoop app directory.
Prefer installing from an elevated PowerShell if UAC/setup fails. Uninstall removes the driver via the vendor uninstaller in that folder.

uninstaller.script: $pf = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('ProgramFiles'); $d = Join-Path $pf 'KoordASIO'; $u = Get-ChildItem $d -Filter 'unins*.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -ne $u) { Start-Process $u.FullName -ArgumentList '/VERYSILENT','/SUPPRESSMSGBOXES','/NORESTART' -Wait } else { warn 'KoordASIO uninstaller not found; remove manually from Program Files if needed.' }
